augmentation.description: Imbues allies with the might of the Black dragons, and bends time & fate in their favor with Bronze magic. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

nodes.name: Landslide
nodes.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Obsidian Scales
nodes.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.

nodes.name: Expunge
nodes.description: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

nodes.name: Natural Convergence
nodes.description: Disintegrate channels 20% faster.

nodes.name: Heavy Wingbeats
nodes.description: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

nodes.name: Verdant Embrace
nodes.description: Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.

nodes.name: Forger of Mountains
nodes.description: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

nodes.name: Innate Magic
nodes.description: Essence regenerates 5% faster.

nodes.name: Obsidian Bulwark
nodes.description: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

nodes.name: Enkindled
nodes.description: Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.

nodes.name: Scarlet Adaptation
nodes.description: Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

nodes.name: Inner Radiance
nodes.description: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.

nodes.name: Recall
nodes.description: You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

nodes.name: Clobbering Sweep
nodes.description: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

nodes.name: Tailwind
nodes.description: Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.

nodes.name: Cauterizing Flame
nodes.description: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.

nodes.name: Ancient Flame
nodes.description: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.

nodes.name: Instinctive Arcana
nodes.description: Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Tip the Scales
nodes.description: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

nodes.name: Attuned to the Dream
nodes.description: Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Sleep Walk
nodes.description: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

nodes.name: Protracted Talons
nodes.description: Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.

nodes.name: Inherent Resistance
nodes.description: Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.

nodes.name: Draconic Legacy
nodes.description: Your Stamina is increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Extended Flight
nodes.description: Hover lasts 2 sec longer.

nodes.name: Bountiful Bloom
nodes.description: Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.

nodes.name: Regenerative Magic
nodes.description: Your Leech is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Blast Furnace
nodes.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

nodes.name: Exuberance
nodes.description: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Renewing Blaze
nodes.description: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Walloping Blow
nodes.description: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Panacea
nodes.description: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.

nodes.name: Stretch Time
nodes.description: While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.

nodes.name: Unravel
nodes.description: Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,561 additional Spellfrost damage to them.

nodes.name: Oppressing Roar
nodes.description: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.

nodes.name: Foci of Life
nodes.description: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

nodes.name: Rescue
nodes.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

nodes.name: Lush Growth
nodes.description: Green spells restore 5% more health.

nodes.name: Source of Magic
nodes.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Strike from Above
nodes.description: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Leaping Flames
nodes.description: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

nodes.name: Overawe
nodes.description: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Aerial Mastery
nodes.description: Hover gains 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Twin Guardian
nodes.description: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Potent Mana
nodes.description: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

nodes.name: Terror of the Skies
nodes.description: Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.

choices.name: Time Spiral
choices.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

choices.name: Spatial Paradox
choices.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

nodes.name: Zephyr
nodes.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Ebon Might
nodes.description:
Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by 8.0% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, Deep Breath, and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

nodes.name: Eruption
nodes.description: Cause a violent eruption beneath an enemy's feet, dealing 1,064 Volcanic damage split between them and nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Essence Burst
nodes.description: Your Living Flame has a 20% chance, and your Azure Strike has a 15% chance, to make your next Eruption cost no Essence.

nodes.name: Quell
nodes.description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Ricocheting Pyroclast
nodes.description: Eruption deals 30% more damage per enemy struck, up to 150%.

nodes.name: Essence Attunement
nodes.description: Essence Burst stacks 2 times.

choices.name: Pupil of Alexstrasza
choices.description: When cast at an enemy, Living Flame strikes 1 additional enemy for 100% damage.

choices.name: Echoing Strike
choices.description: Azure Strike deals 15% increased damage and has a 10% chance per target hit to echo, casting again.

nodes.name: Upheaval
nodes.description:
Gather earthen power beneath your enemy's feet and send them hurtling upwards, dealing 1,618 Volcanic damage to the target and nearby enemies.

Empowering expands the area of effect.

I:   3 yd radius.

II:  6 yd radius.

III: 9 yd radius.

nodes.name: Breath of Eons
nodes.description:
Fly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec.

Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying.

 Temporal Wound
15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.

Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

nodes.name: Defy Fate
nodes.description:
Fatal attacks are diverted into a nearby timeline, preventing the damage, and your death, in this one.

The release of temporal energy restores 9,930 health to you, and 3,359 to 4 nearby allies, over 9 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

May only occur once every 6 min.

nodes.name: Ignition Rush
nodes.description: Essence Burst reduces the cast time of Eruption by 40% and increases its damage by 20%.

nodes.name: Power Nexus
nodes.description: Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

nodes.name: Volcanism
nodes.description: Eruption's Essence cost is reduced by 1.

choices.name: Perilous Fate
choices.description: Breath of Eons reduces enemies' movement speed by 70%, and reduces their attack speed by 50%, for 10 sec.

choices.name: Chrono Ward
choices.description: When allies deal damage with Temporal Wounds, they gain a shield for 100% of the damage dealt. Absorption cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Bestow Weyrnstone
nodes.description:
Conjure a pair of Weyrnstones, one for your target ally and one for yourself. Only one ally may bear your Weyrnstone at a time.

A Weyrnstone can be activated by the bearer to transport them to the other Weyrnstone's location, if they are within 100 yds.

nodes.name: Timelessness
nodes.description:
Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.

nodes.name: Improved Defy Fate
nodes.description: Defy Fate healing increased by 100% and its cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

nodes.name: Blistering Scales
nodes.description:
Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing 114 Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

nodes.name: Draconic Attunements
nodes.description:
Learn to attune yourself to the essence of the Black or Bronze Dragonflights:

Black Attunement: You and your 4 nearest allies have 2% increased maximum health.

Bronze Attunement:You and your 4 nearest allies have 10% increased movement speed.

nodes.name: Prescience
nodes.description:
Grant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% for 18 sec.

Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted.

choices.name: Unyielding Domain
choices.description: Upheaval cannot be interrupted, and has an additional 10% chance to critically strike.

choices.name: Tectonic Locus
choices.description: Upheaval deals 50% increased damage to the primary target, and launches them higher.

choices.name: Regenerative Chitin
choices.description: Blistering Scales no longer loses charges and deals 20% more damage.

choices.name: Molten Blood
choices.description: When cast, Blistering Scales grants the target a shield that absorbs up to 4,560 damage for 30 sec based on their missing health. Lower health targets gain a larger shield.

nodes.name: Momentum Shift
nodes.description: Consuming Essence Burst grants you 5% Intellect for 6 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Aspects' Favor
nodes.description:
Obsidian Scales activates Black Attunement, and amplifies it to increase maximum health by 3.0% for 12 sec.

Hover activates Bronze Attunement, and amplifies it to increase movement speed by 25% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Arcane Reach
nodes.description: The range of your helpful magics is increased by 5 yards.

nodes.name: Fate Mirror
nodes.description: Prescience grants the ally a chance for their spells and abilities to echo their damage or healing, dealing 15% of the amount again.

nodes.name: Symbiotic Bloom
nodes.description: Emerald Blossom increases targets' healing received by 3% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Reactive Hide
nodes.description: Each time Blistering Scales explodes it deals 15% more damage for 12 sec, stacking 10 times.

nodes.name: Font of Magic
nodes.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.

nodes.name: Hoarded Power
nodes.description: Essence Burst has a 20% chance to not be consumed.

nodes.name: Motes of Possibility
nodes.description: Eruption has a 25% chance to form a mote of diverted essence near you. Allies who comes in contact with the mote gain a random buff from your arsenal.

nodes.name: Anachronism
nodes.description: Prescience has a 35% chance to grant Essence Burst.

choices.name: Prolong Life
choices.description: Your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Symbiotic Bloom.

choices.name: Dream of Spring
choices.description: Emerald Blossom no longer has a cooldown, deals 35% increased healing, and increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1 sec, but costs 3 Essence.

nodes.name: Accretion
nodes.description: Eruption reduces the remaining cooldown of Upheaval by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Imminent Destruction
nodes.description: Deep Breath reduces the Essence cost of your next 6 Eruptions by 1.

nodes.name: Time Skip
nodes.description: Surge forward in time, causing your cooldowns to recover 1,000% faster for 2 sec.

nodes.name: Clairvoyant
nodes.description: Motes of Possibility may now grant Prescience to allies and have a 10% increased chance to activate.

nodes.name: Inferno's Blessing
nodes.description: Fire Breath grants the inferno's blessing for 8 sec to you and a nearby ally, giving their damaging attacks and spells a high chance to deal an additional 1,022 Fire damage.

nodes.name: Rumbling Earth
nodes.description: Upheaval causes an aftershock at its location, dealing 30% of its damage 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Plot the Future
nodes.description: Deep Breath grants you Fury of the Aspects for 15 sec after you land, without causing Exhaustion.

choices.name: Tomorrow, Today
choices.description: Time Skip channels for 1 sec longer.

choices.name: Interwoven Threads
choices.description: The cooldowns of your spells are reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Overlord
nodes.description: Deep Breath casts an Eruption at the first 3 enemies struck. These Eruptions have a 100% chance to create a Mote of Possibility.

nodes.name: Mighty Inferno
nodes.description: Inferno's Blessing's damage is increased by 40%, and your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Inferno's Blessing.

ranks.description: Breath of Eons summons a version of you from the future to assist you in battle, lasting 20 sec. Your duplicate casts Eruption, Fire Breath, and Upheaval.
Any time you extend Ebon Might, your duplicate is also extended, equal to 50% of the amount you extended Ebon Might by.
While your duplicate is active, your Ebon Might grants 75% additional stats and Upheaval and Eruption deal 25% increased damage.

nodes.name: Melt Armor
nodes.description:
Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

choices.name: Extended Battle
choices.description: Essence abilities extend Bombardments by 1 sec.

choices.name: Diverted Power
choices.description: Bombardments have a chance to generate Essence Burst.

choices.name: Hardened Scales
choices.description: Obsidian Scales reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Menacing Presence
choices.description: Knocking enemies up or backwards reduces their damage done to you by 15% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Unrelenting Siege
nodes.description: For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and Disintegrate deal 1% increased damage, up to 15%.

nodes.name: Bombardments
nodes.description:
Mass Disintegrate marks your primary target for destruction for the next 6 sec.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing 1,805 Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Mass Disintegrate
nodes.description: Empower spells cause your next Disintegrate to strike up to 3 targets. When striking fewer than 3 targets, Disintegrate damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

nodes.name: Maneuverability
nodes.description:
Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for 2,554 Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

choices.name: Nimble Flyer
choices.description: While Hovering, damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Slipstream
choices.description: Deep Breath resets a charge of Hover.

nodes.name: Onslaught
nodes.description: Entering combat grants a charge of Burnout, causing your next Living Flame to cast instantly.

nodes.name: Might of the Black Dragonflight
nodes.description: Black spells deal 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Wingleader
nodes.description: Bombardments reduce the cooldown of Deep Breath by 0.5 sec for each target struck, up to 1.5 sec.

nodes.name: Mass Eruption
nodes.description: Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to 3 targets. When striking less than 3 targets, Eruption damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

nodes.name: Refined Essence
nodes.description: Essence abilities deal 15% additional damage.

nodes.name: Concentrated Power
nodes.description: Mass Disintegrate strikes 1 additional target.

nodes.name: Command Squadron
nodes.description: While flying during Deep Breath you are assisted by a squadron of Dracthyr who assault enemies with Pyre, dealing 688 Fire damage to nearby enemies up to 8 times.

nodes.name: Reverberations
nodes.description: Upheaval deals 50% additional damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Afterimage
nodes.description: Empower spells send up to 3 Chrono Flames to your targets.

nodes.name: Instability Matrix
nodes.description: Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to 6 sec.

choices.name: Double-time
choices.description: Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant 50% additional stats.

choices.name: Time Convergence
choices.description:
Non-defensive abilities with a 45 second or longer cooldown grant 5% Intellect for 15 sec.

Essence spells extend the duration by 1 sec.

choices.name: Temporality
choices.description: Warp reduces damage taken by 20%, starting high and reducing over 3 sec.

choices.name: Motes of Acceleration
choices.description: Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Golden Opportunity
nodes.description: Prescience lasts 15% longer.

nodes.name: Nozdormu Adept
nodes.description: Prescience cooldown reduced by 2 sec and it grants 1% additional critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Warp
nodes.description:
Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by 5 sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.

nodes.name: Primacy
nodes.description: For each damage over time effect from Upheaval, gain 3% haste, up to 9%.

nodes.name: Chrono Flame
nodes.description: Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to 950.

nodes.name: Temporal Burst
nodes.description: Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by 30%, decreasing over 30 sec.

nodes.name: Overclock
nodes.description: Chrono Flames' maximum damage or healing is increased by 40%, up to 1,330 Arcane.

nodes.name: Chronal Dynamo
nodes.description: Living Flame's cast time is reduced by 0.2 sec, and it deals 50% increased damage or healing when it is a non-instant cast.

nodes.name: Chronoboon
nodes.description: Tip the Scales' cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

devastation.description: Releases innate power as chaotic Red flames or focused Blue magic to bathe the battlefield in destruction. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

nodes.name: Landslide
nodes.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Obsidian Scales
nodes.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.

nodes.name: Foci of Life
nodes.description: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

nodes.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

nodes.name: Lush Growth
nodes.description: Green spells restore 5% more health.

nodes.name: Source of Magic
nodes.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Strike from Above
nodes.description: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Leaping Flames
nodes.description: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

nodes.name: Overawe
nodes.description: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Aerial Mastery
nodes.description: Hover gains 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Twin Guardian
nodes.description: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Potent Mana
nodes.description: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

nodes.name: Terror of the Skies
nodes.description: Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.

choices.name: Time Spiral
choices.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

choices.name: Spatial Paradox
choices.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

nodes.name: Zephyr
nodes.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Pyre
nodes.description: Lob a ball of flame, dealing 1,511 Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.

nodes.name: Ruby Essence Burst
nodes.description: Your Living Flame has a 20% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.

nodes.name: Azure Essence Burst
nodes.description: Azure Strike has a 15% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.

nodes.name: Lay Waste
nodes.description: Deep Breath's damage is increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Quell
nodes.description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Eternity Surge
nodes.description:
Focus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing 4,084 Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.

I:   Damages 1 enemy.

II:  Damages 2 enemies.

III: Damages 3 enemies.

nodes.name: Volatility
nodes.description: Pyre has a 15% chance to flare up and explode again on a nearby target.

nodes.name: Power Nexus
nodes.description: Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

nodes.name: Dragonrage
nodes.description:
Erupt with draconic fury and exhale Pyres at 3 enemies within 25 yds.

For 18 sec, Essence Burst's chance to occur is increased to 100%.

nodes.name: Azure Sweep
nodes.description:
Eternity Surge upgrades your next Azure Strike to Azure Sweep, damaging all nearby enemies and dealing 75% additional damage.

 Azure Sweep
Concentrate azure energy into your tail and sweep to release pure magic upon an enemy and nearby targets for 615 Spellfrost damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Arcane Intensity
nodes.description: Disintegrate and Azure Strike deal 8% more damage.

nodes.name: Ruby Embers
nodes.description: Living Flame deals 115 damage over 12 sec to enemies, or restores 221 health to allies over 12 sec. Stacks 3 times.

nodes.name: Animosity
nodes.description:
Casting an empower spell extends the duration of Dragonrage by 5 sec.

Each time this occurs during Dragonrage, its effectiveness is reduced by 25%.

nodes.name: Essence Attunement
nodes.description: Essence Burst stacks 2 times.

nodes.name: Engulfing Blaze
nodes.description: Living Flame deals 10% increased damage and healing and its cast time is reduced by 0.3 sec.

nodes.name: Heat Wave
nodes.description: Fire Breath deals 15% more damage.

nodes.name: Honed Aggression
nodes.description: The critical strike chance of your spells is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Eternity's Span
nodes.description: Eternity Surge hits twice as many targets.

choices.name: Eye of Infinity
choices.description: Eternity Surge deals 15% increased damage to your primary target.

choices.name: Event Horizon
choices.description: Eternity Surge's cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Catalyze
nodes.description: While channeling Disintegrate your Fire Breath on the target deals damage 100% more often.

nodes.name: Tyranny
nodes.description: During Deep Breath and Dragonrage you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health.

nodes.name: Charged Blast
nodes.description: Your Blue damage increases the damage of your next Pyre by 2%, stacking 20 times.

nodes.name: Shattering Stars
nodes.description:
Eternity Surge additionally releases a Shattering Star at your target that deals 50% more damage per empower level reached.

 Shattering Star
Exhale a bolt of concentrated power from your mouth at the target for 669 Spellfrost damage.

nodes.name: Feed the Flames
nodes.description:
After casting 6 Pyres, your next Pyre will explode into a Firestorm.

 Firestorm
An explosion bombards the target area with white-hot embers, dealing 5,470 Fire damage to enemies over 10 sec.

nodes.name: Burnout
nodes.description: Fire Breath damage has 16% chance to cause your next Living Flame to be instant cast, stacking 2 times.

nodes.name: Onyx Legacy
nodes.description: Deep Breath's cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

nodes.name: Spellweaver's Dominance
nodes.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Star Salvo
nodes.description:
Increases Shattering Star damage by 35%.

Shattering Stars are exhaled at all of your Eternity Surge targets.

nodes.name: Imminent Destruction
nodes.description: Deep Breath reduces the Essence costs of your next 4 Disintegrates and Pyres by 1. Stacks up to 8 times.

nodes.name: Font of Magic
nodes.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.

nodes.name: Titanic Wrath
nodes.description: Essence Burst increases the damage of affected spells by 15.0%.

nodes.name: Azure Celerity
nodes.description: Disintegrate deals damage 25% more often, but deals 10% less damage.

nodes.name: Power Swell
nodes.description: Casting an empower spell increases your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Strafing Run
nodes.description:
Deep Breath deals 20% increased damage and can be cast again within 18 sec of being used.

Recall will be available after the second cast if talented.

nodes.name: Scorching Embers
nodes.description: Enemies affected by Fire Breath's damage over time effect take 25% increased damage from your Red spells.

nodes.name: Causality
nodes.description:
Disintegrate reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.50 sec each time it deals damage.

Pyre reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.40 sec per enemy struck, up to 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Scintillation
nodes.description: Disintegrate has a 15% chance each time it deals damage to launch a level 1 Eternity Surge at 40% power.

nodes.name: Iridescence
nodes.description: Casting an empower spell increases the damage of your next 2 spells of the same color by 20% within 10 sec.

ranks.description: While Dragonrage is active you gain Rising Fury every 6 sec, increasing your haste by 4%, stacking up to 5 times.
At 5 stacks of Rising Fury, all damage dealt is increased by 8%.

When Dragonrage ends, gain Risen Fury for 4 sec for each stack of Rising Fury.

Risen Fury grants the damage and haste bonuses accumulated from Rising Fury and generates Essence Burst every 4 sec.

nodes.name: Melt Armor
nodes.description:
Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

choices.name: Extended Battle
choices.description: Essence abilities extend Bombardments by 1 sec.

choices.name: Diverted Power
choices.description: Bombardments have a chance to generate Essence Burst.

choices.name: Hardened Scales
choices.description: Obsidian Scales reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

choices.name: Menacing Presence
choices.description: Knocking enemies up or backwards reduces their damage done to you by 15% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Unrelenting Siege
nodes.description: For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and Disintegrate deal 1% increased damage, up to 15%.

nodes.name: Bombardments
nodes.description:
Mass Disintegrate marks your primary target for destruction for the next 6 sec.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing 1,805 Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Mass Disintegrate
nodes.description: Empower spells cause your next Disintegrate to strike up to 3 targets. When striking fewer than 3 targets, Disintegrate damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

nodes.name: Maneuverability
nodes.description:
Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for 2,554 Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

choices.name: Nimble Flyer
choices.description: While Hovering, damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Slipstream
choices.description: Deep Breath resets a charge of Hover.

nodes.name: Onslaught
nodes.description: Entering combat grants a charge of Burnout, causing your next Living Flame to cast instantly.

nodes.name: Might of the Black Dragonflight
nodes.description: Black spells deal 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Wingleader
nodes.description: Bombardments reduce the cooldown of Deep Breath by 0.5 sec for each target struck, up to 1.5 sec.

nodes.name: Mass Eruption
nodes.description: Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to 3 targets. When striking less than 3 targets, Eruption damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

nodes.name: Refined Essence
nodes.description: Essence abilities deal 15% additional damage.

nodes.name: Concentrated Power
nodes.description: Mass Disintegrate strikes 1 additional target.

nodes.name: Command Squadron
nodes.description: While flying during Deep Breath you are assisted by a squadron of Dracthyr who assault enemies with Pyre, dealing 685 Fire damage to nearby enemies up to 8 times.

nodes.name: Titanic Precision
nodes.description: Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

nodes.name: Consume Flame
nodes.description:
Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.

nodes.name: Fulminous Roar
nodes.description: Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.

choices.name: Lifecinders
choices.description: Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.

choices.name: Draconic Instincts
choices.description: Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.

choices.name: Trailblazer
choices.description: Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.

choices.name: Shape of Flame
choices.description: Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.

nodes.name: Deep Exhalation
nodes.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

nodes.name: Burning Adrenaline
nodes.description: Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.

nodes.name: Conduit of Flame
nodes.description: Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Legacy of the Lifebinder
nodes.description: Fire Breath gains an additional charge.

choices.name: Enkindle
choices.description: Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.

choices.name: Expanded Lungs
choices.description: Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Ashes in Motion
nodes.description: Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Fire Torrent
nodes.description: Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.

nodes.name: Essence Well
nodes.description: Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.

nodes.name: Twin Flame
nodes.description: Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for 684 Fire damage.

preservation.description: Calls upon the Emerald Dream to rejuvenate life, and the Bronze sands of time to prevent harm. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

nodes.name: Landslide
nodes.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Obsidian Scales
nodes.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.

nodes.name: Expunge
nodes.description: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

nodes.name: Natural Convergence
nodes.description: Disintegrate channels 20% faster.

nodes.name: Heavy Wingbeats
nodes.description: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

nodes.name: Verdant Embrace
nodes.description: Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.

nodes.name: Forger of Mountains
nodes.description: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

nodes.name: Innate Magic
nodes.description: Essence regenerates 5% faster.

nodes.name: Obsidian Bulwark
nodes.description: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

nodes.name: Enkindled
nodes.description: Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.

nodes.name: Scarlet Adaptation
nodes.description: Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

nodes.name: Inner Radiance
nodes.description: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.

nodes.name: Recall
nodes.description: You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

nodes.name: Clobbering Sweep
nodes.description: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

nodes.name: Tailwind
nodes.description: Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.

nodes.name: Cauterizing Flame
nodes.description: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.

nodes.name: Ancient Flame
nodes.description: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.

nodes.name: Instinctive Arcana
nodes.description: Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Tip the Scales
nodes.description: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

nodes.name: Attuned to the Dream
nodes.description: Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Sleep Walk
nodes.description: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

nodes.name: Protracted Talons
nodes.description: Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.

nodes.name: Inherent Resistance
nodes.description: Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.

nodes.name: Draconic Legacy
nodes.description: Your Stamina is increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Extended Flight
nodes.description: Hover lasts 2 sec longer.

nodes.name: Bountiful Bloom
nodes.description: Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.

nodes.name: Regenerative Magic
nodes.description: Your Leech is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Blast Furnace
nodes.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

nodes.name: Exuberance
nodes.description: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Renewing Blaze
nodes.description: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Walloping Blow
nodes.description: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Panacea
nodes.description: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.

nodes.name: Stretch Time
nodes.description: While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.

nodes.name: Unravel
nodes.description: Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,505 additional Spellfrost damage to them.

nodes.name: Oppressing Roar
nodes.description: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.

nodes.name: Foci of Life
nodes.description: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

nodes.name: Rescue
nodes.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

nodes.name: Lush Growth
nodes.description: Green spells restore 5% more health.

nodes.name: Source of Magic
nodes.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Strike from Above
nodes.description: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Leaping Flames
nodes.description: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

nodes.name: Overawe
nodes.description: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Aerial Mastery
nodes.description: Hover gains 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Twin Guardian
nodes.description: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Potent Mana
nodes.description: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

nodes.name: Terror of the Skies
nodes.description: Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.

choices.name: Time Spiral
choices.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

choices.name: Spatial Paradox
choices.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

nodes.name: Zephyr
nodes.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Echo
nodes.description: Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for 912 and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at 70% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

nodes.name: Dream Breath
nodes.description:
Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for 1,634.

I:   Heals 700 instantly and 934 over 16 sec.

II:  Heals 934 instantly and 700 over 12 sec.

III: Heals 1,167 instantly and 467 over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Reversion
nodes.description:
Reverse an ally's injuries, healing them for 1,092 over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

nodes.name: Temporal Compression
nodes.description: Each cast of a Bronze spell causes your next empower spell to reach maximum level in 10% less time, stacking up to 4 times.

nodes.name: Essence Burst
nodes.description: Living Flame has a 20% chance, and Reversion has a 15% chance to make your next Essence ability free.

nodes.name: Rewind
nodes.description:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least 760.

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.

nodes.name: Lifebind
nodes.description: Verdant Embrace temporarily bonds your life with an ally, causing your healing on either partner to heal the other for 60% of the amount. Lasts 8 sec.

nodes.name: Essence Attunement
nodes.description: Essence Burst stacks 2 times.

nodes.name: Time Dilation
nodes.description: Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Unshakable
nodes.description: Your empower spells are 10% more effective. While charging a healing empower spell, you cannot be knocked back.

nodes.name: Fluttering Seedlings
nodes.description:
Emerald Blossom sends out 1 flying seedling when it bursts, plus up to 2 additional seedlings if Emerald Blossom heals fewer than 3 allies.

Seedlings each heal an ally up to 40 yds away for 988.

nodes.name: Font of Magic
nodes.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1.

nodes.name: Golden Hour
nodes.description: Reversion instantly heals the target for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec.

choices.name: Delay Harm
choices.description: 15% of delayed damage from Time Dilation is absorbed.

choices.name: Just in Time
choices.description: Time Dilation gains an additional charge, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Temporal Anomaly
nodes.description:
Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing 2,280 damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.

choices.name: Empath
choices.description: Empower spells increase your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Spiritual Clarity
choices.description: Dream Breath's cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Exhilarating Burst
nodes.description: Each time you gain Essence Burst, your critical heals are 230% effective instead of the usual 200% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Field of Dreams
nodes.description: Every other Emerald Blossom has a 100% chance for one of your Fluttering Seedlings to grow into a new Emerald Blossom.

nodes.name: Power Nexus
nodes.description: Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

nodes.name: Time Lord
nodes.description: Echo replicates 25% more healing.

nodes.name: Flow State
nodes.description: Empower spells cause time to flow 5% faster for you, increasing movement speed, cooldown recharge rate, and cast speed. Lasts 10 sec.

choices.name: Temporal Barrier
choices.description: Send out a ripple of temporal energy, absorbing 3,420 damage and applying Echo at 30% effectiveness on your target and up to 4 allies within 40 yds.

choices.name: Nozdormu's Teachings
choices.description: Temporal Anomaly reduces the cooldowns of your empower spells by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Call of Ysera
nodes.description: Dream Breath healing increased by 20%, and Living Flame healing increased by 30%.

choices.name: Dream Flight
choices.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for 1,900 immediately, and 4,284 over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Stasis
choices.description: Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

nodes.name: Grace Period
nodes.description: Your healing is increased by 10% on targets with your Reversion.

nodes.name: Spark of Insight
nodes.description: Consuming a full Temporal Compression grants you Essence Burst.

nodes.name: Ouroboros
nodes.description: Casting Echo grants one stack of Ouroboros, increasing the healing of your next Emerald Blossom by 30%, stacking up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Life-Giver's Flame
nodes.description: Fire Breath and Deep Breath heal 5 nearby injured allies for 80% of damage done to up to 5 targets, split evenly among them.

nodes.name: Inner Flame
nodes.description: Casting Dream Flight or Stasis increases your healing over time by 60% and causes Living Flame and Reversion to have a 100% increased chance to grant Essence Burst. Lasts 15 sec.

nodes.name: Temporal Artificer
nodes.description: Rewind's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Energy Loop
nodes.description: Disintegrate deals 35% more damage and generates 1,080 mana over its duration.

nodes.name: Time of Need
nodes.description:
When you or an ally fall below 30% health, a version of yourself enters your timeline and heals them for 12,061. Your alternate self continues healing for 8 sec before returning to their timeline.

May only occur once every 60 sec.

nodes.name: Renewing Breath
nodes.description: Dream Breath healing is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Lifeforce Mender
nodes.description: Red spells deal 20% additional damage and healing.

nodes.name: Timeless Magic
nodes.description: Reversion, Time Dilation, Echo, and Temporal Anomaly last 15% longer and cost 15% less mana.

choices.name: Dream Simulacrum
choices.description: Verdant Embrace healing is increased by 30%. In addition, it no longer causes you to leap to your target, instead sending forth a Dream Simulacrum.

choices.name: Wings of Liberty
choices.description: Verdant Embrace gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Titan's Gift
nodes.description: Essence Burst increases the effectiveness of your next Essence ability by 35%.

nodes.name: Lifespark
nodes.description: Reversion healing has a chance to cause your next Living Flame to cast instantly and deal 50% increased healing or damage. Stacks up to 2 charges.

nodes.name: Twin Echoes
nodes.description: Casting Emerald Blossom causes your next Echo to cast on an additional ally within 25 yards at 100% effectiveness. Stacks up to 2 charges.

nodes.name: Tempo Charged
nodes.description: Bronze healing and absorption increased by 15%.

ranks.description:
Essence abilities have a chance to infuse your next Reversion with the power of the Green Dragonflight, upgrading it to Merithra's Blessing:

 Merithra's Blessing
Spring a bloom of life from your target, healing them and up to 4 other allies within 30 yards for 950. Blooms may heal your primary target multiple times if no nearby injured allies are present.
Reversion protects allies, reversing 0.5% of all damage taken and healing them instead.
Dream Breath's instant healing is increased by 250% and Dream Breath has a 100% chance to grant Merithra's Blessing.

nodes.name: Titanic Precision
nodes.description: Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

nodes.name: Consume Flame
nodes.description:
Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.

nodes.name: Fulminous Roar
nodes.description: Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.

choices.name: Lifecinders
choices.description: Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.

choices.name: Draconic Instincts
choices.description: Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.

choices.name: Trailblazer
choices.description: Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.

choices.name: Shape of Flame
choices.description: Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.

nodes.name: Deep Exhalation
nodes.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

nodes.name: Burning Adrenaline
nodes.description: Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.

nodes.name: Conduit of Flame
nodes.description: Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Legacy of the Lifebinder
nodes.description: Fire Breath gains an additional charge.

choices.name: Enkindle
choices.description: Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.

choices.name: Expanded Lungs
choices.description: Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Ashes in Motion
nodes.description: Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Fire Torrent
nodes.description: Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.

nodes.name: Essence Well
nodes.description: Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.

nodes.name: Twin Flame
nodes.description: Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for 684 Fire damage.

nodes.name: Reverberations
nodes.description: Upheaval deals 50% additional damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Afterimage
nodes.description: Empower spells send up to 3 Chrono Flames to your targets.

nodes.name: Instability Matrix
nodes.description: Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to 6 sec.

choices.name: Double-time
choices.description: Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant 50% additional stats.

choices.name: Time Convergence
choices.description:
Non-defensive abilities with a 45 second or longer cooldown grant 5% Intellect for 15 sec.

Essence spells extend the duration by 1 sec.

choices.name: Temporality
choices.description: Warp reduces damage taken by 20%, starting high and reducing over 3 sec.

choices.name: Motes of Acceleration
choices.description: Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Golden Opportunity
nodes.description: Prescience lasts 15% longer.

nodes.name: Nozdormu Adept
nodes.description: Prescience cooldown reduced by 2 sec and it grants 1% additional critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Warp
nodes.description:
Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by 5 sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.

nodes.name: Primacy
nodes.description: For each damage over time effect from Upheaval, gain 3% haste, up to 9%.

nodes.name: Chrono Flame
nodes.description: Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to 950.

nodes.name: Temporal Burst
nodes.description: Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by 30%, decreasing over 30 sec.

nodes.name: Overclock
nodes.description: Chrono Flames' maximum damage or healing is increased by 40%, up to 1,330 Arcane.

nodes.name: Chronal Dynamo
nodes.description: Living Flame's cast time is reduced by 0.2 sec, and it deals 50% increased damage or healing when it is a non-instant cast.

nodes.name: Chronoboon
nodes.description: Tip the Scales' cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
